Scraping Logic: Standard Lever API. HTTP GET request. Data Path: Root level [array]. Field Mapping: title = 'text'; location = 'location'; link = 'hostedUrl'.

Standard Greenhouse Public API. HTTP GET request. Data Path: Response JSON -> 'jobs' [array]. Field Mapping: title = 'title'; location = 'location.name'; link = 'absolute_url'; updated_at = 'updated_at'.

HTTP GET request. Pagination: Append '&start=[offset]' to endpoint, incrementing by 10 per page until 'positions' array is empty. Data Path: Response JSON -> 'positions' [array]. Field Mapping: title = 'name'; location = 'location'; link = 'canonicalPositionUrl'; unique_id = 'id'.
Standard Ashby Public API (GET). Path: json -> 'jobs'. Mapping: title='title'; loc='location'; link='jobUrl'.
